# vendor

This folder holds proprietary Infineon binaries that we are not allowed to redistribute. Everything here except this README is git-ignored.

What goes here.

- The downloaded `DAS_*_linux_x64.deb` from the Infineon TAS page
- `das/`, the extracted package produced by `scripts/install-tas.sh`, which contains `tas_server`

Download instructions are in `docs/linux-setup.md`. Nothing in this folder is committed to the repo.
